activation.reason: V10 exposes status and doctor output, but operators still need a deterministic next-action contract before DWM can safely grow into execution orchestration.

assumptions.claim: The next useful product slice is operator guidance, not external runtime execution.
assumptions.verification: The new command must derive recommendations only from trusted repo-local artifacts and must not execute workflow stages.

assumptions.claim: A stable next-action JSON contract can become the handoff between the control-plane and later adapters.
assumptions.verification: The command must expose action, trust checks, approval requirement, safe default, commands, and blockers.

budget.file_touch_limit: one product CLI update, one V11 plan, one V11 spec, one decision doc, README, roadmap, and release contract updates

first_slice.completion_check: python scripts/dwm.py next --run out/v9/v32-semantic-dogfood --json reports trusted true and recommendation.action complete
first_slice.expected_output: A read-only DWM next-action command with stable JSON operator guidance
first_slice.instruction: Extend the DWM product CLI with a read-only next-action command that verifies run trust and recommends the next safe operator action.

objective: Add deterministic operator guidance to DWM so a user or future runtime adapter can ask what the next safe action is for a trusted run.

barriers: next surface before product command discovery
product command discovery before contract update
parallelism.fan_in_rule: No parallel fan-in in the first slice; one canonical dogfood run is enough to prove the operator guidance contract.

exit_criteria: next command reads an owned run directory
next command validates trust before recommending action
phases.name: Next Action Surface

exit_criteria: commands --kind product lists status, next, doctor, and commands
self-test asserts the product command set
phases.name: Product Command Discovery

exit_criteria: contract checks validate V11 docs and CLI output
README and roadmap describe the V11 operator surface
phases.name: Contract Update

exit_criteria: docs/v11-decision.md records keep with generated CLI values
quick validation and release checks pass
phases.name: Release Decision

risk_gates.safe_default: stop before writing and ask for approval
stop before shell use and ask for approval
stop before network use and ask for approval
stop before sending external messages and ask for approval

source_prompt: Write the next DWM spec, design the full workflow, and execute the next workflow.

verification.claim_or_output: The next command recommends complete for the trusted V9 dogfood run.
verification.falsifier: The command returns a recommendation without first proving trusted artifacts.

verification.claim_or_output: The product command set exposes the operator guidance workflow.
verification.falsifier: The product command set omits the next command or references a missing path.

verification.claim_or_output: V11 does not claim autonomous external execution.
verification.falsifier: Docs imply Codex, OMX, worker, worktree, network, or deployment execution.

prompt_contract.required_output_schema: dwm next JSON and product command JSON

workers.role: Implement a read-only operator guidance command and bind it into release contracts.
